tṛṇīkṛ 8 U.
1 To make light of, look down upon, treat with contempt;  U. 6. 19. 
2 (Hence) To eclipse, obscure; jagāda vaktreṇa tṛṇīkṛteṃduḥ  N. 3. 54.
